response:
Emily started with 25 dogs at her rescue center located at [address] and added 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday which brings the total to 30 before any adoptions occurred. The team at [name] worked hard to prepare the kennels at [location] for the new arrivals while ensuring the staff member [name] was ready to help with the intake process at [time].

***

On Saturday, two families adopted three dogs each meaning 6 dogs left the facility so Emily now has 24 dogs remaining in her care. The adoption records are stored in [file] and the next event is scheduled for [date] at the venue [place] where the contact person [name] will manage the logistics for the upcoming weekend.
